ddls:
CREATE TABLE "crop_rotations" (
  "rotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crop rotation pattern */,
  "year_from" INTEGER /* Starting year of the crop rotation period */,
  "year_to" INTEGER /* Ending year of the crop rotation period */,
  "crop_rotate" TEXT /* Type of crop rotation (e.g., corn_corn, corn_soy) */,
  "crop_from" TEXT /* Initial crop in the rotation */,
  "crop_to" TEXT /* Final crop in the rotation */,
  "climate_zone" TEXT /* Climate zone where the crop rotation is implemented */,
  "soil_type" TEXT /* Soil type used for the crop rotation */,
  "irrigation_method" TEXT /* Irrigation method used for the crop rotation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rotation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crops" (
  "crop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crop */,
  "crop_name" TEXT /* Name of the crop (e.g., corn, soy) */,
  "crop_color" TEXT /* Color associated with the crop for visualization */,
  "growth_period" INTEGER /* Growth period of the crop in days */,
  "water_requirement" REAL /* Water requirement of the crop in liters per hectare */,
  "fertilizer_requirement" REAL /* Fertilizer requirement of the crop in kilograms per hectare */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geographical_data" (
  "geo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geographical data point */,
  "plot_x_axis_from" REAL /* Starting x-axis value for the plot */,
  "plot_x_axis_to" REAL /* Ending x-axis value for the plot */,
  "plot_y_axis_from" REAL /* Starting y-axis value for the plot */,
  "plot_y_axis_to" REAL /* Ending y-axis value for the plot */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the geographical location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the geographical location */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the geographical location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("geo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualization_data" (
  "vis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization data point */,
  "x_end_from" REAL /* Starting x-axis value for the end point */,
  "x_end_to" REAL /* Ending x-axis value for the end point */,
  "y_end_from_streamlined" REAL /* Starting y-axis value for the end point (streamlined) */,
  "y_end_to_streamlined" REAL /* Ending y-axis value for the end point (streamlined) */,
  "color_scheme" TEXT /* Color scheme used for visualization */,
  "font_size" INTEGER /* Font size used for visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vis_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agricultural_data" (
  "agri_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agricultural data point */,
  "rotation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the crop rotation pattern */,
  "geo_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the geographical data point */,
  "total_num_pixels_crop_transition" INTEGER /* Total number of pixels for the crop transition */,
  "total_perc_pixels_wi_area_crop_transition" REAL /* Total percentage of pixels within the area for the crop transition */,
  "average_yield" REAL /* Average yield of the crop in kg/ha */,
  "average_profit" REAL /* Average profit from the crop in $/ha */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agri_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agricultural_data_rotation_id FOREIGN KEY ("rotation_id") REFERENCES crop_rotations ("rotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agricultural_data_geo_id FOREIGN KEY ("geo_id") REFERENCES geographical_data ("geo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "land_usage" (
  "land_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each land usage data point */,
  "rotation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the crop rotation pattern */,
  "total_num_pixels_crop_year_from" INTEGER /* Total number of pixels for the crop year from */,
  "total_perc_pixels_wi_area_crop_year_from" REAL /* Total percentage of pixels within the area for the crop year from */,
  "land_cover_type" TEXT /* Type of land cover (e.g., forest, grassland) */,
  "land_degradation_level" TEXT /* Level of land degradation (e.g., low, moderate, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("land_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_land_usage_rotation_id FOREIGN KEY ("rotation_id") REFERENCES crop_rotations ("rotation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "yearly_data" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each yearly data point */,
  "rotation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the crop rotation pattern */,
  "total_num_pixels_crop_year_to" INTEGER /* Total number of pixels for the crop year to */,
  "total_perc_pixels_wi_area_crop_year_to" REAL /* Total percentage of pixels within the area for the crop year to */,
  "yearly_yield" REAL /* Yearly yield of the crop in kg/ha */,
  "yearly_profit" REAL /* Yearly profit from the crop in $/ha */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_yearly_data_rotation_id FOREIGN KEY ("rotation_id") REFERENCES crop_rotations ("rotation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, policymaker) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "rotation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crop rotation pattern being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used by the user (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_rotation_id FOREIGN KEY ("rotation_id") REFERENCES crop_rotations ("rotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crop_yield_projection" (
  "projection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each projected yield data point */,
  "crop_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the crop */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the yield is projected */,
  "projected_yield" REAL /* Projected yield of the crop in kg/ha */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("projection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crop_yield_projection_crop_id FOREIGN KEY ("crop_id") REFERENCES crops ("crop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data point */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date for which the weather data is recorded */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature in Celsius */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Precipitation in mm */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity in % */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id")
)
